creator: j@pureftpd.org
text:
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.bkp/Makefile ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.bkp/Makefile	Thu Oct  4 20:09:51 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile	Fri Oct 26 08:26:36 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pure-ftpd
-PORTVERSION=	0.99.9
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pureftpd
@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-everything --with-paranoidmsg
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--sysconfdir=/etc
 # language support requested?
 .if defined(WITH_LANG)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-language="${WITH_LANG}"
@@ -86,7 +87,7 @@
 	@${ECHO} "WITH_LANG=lang        - enable compilation of language \
 		support, lang is one of"
 	@${ECHO} "  english, german, romanian, french, polish, spanish, dutch,"
-	@${ECHO} "  italian, brazilian-portuguese or danish."
+	@${ECHO} "  italian, brazilian-portuguese, danish, slovak or korean."
 	@${ECHO}
 
 post-install:
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.bkp/distinfo ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.bkp/distinfo	Thu Oct  4 20:09:51 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo	Fri Oct 26 08:18:58 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.99.9.tar.gz) = 3cc6d17d4029ad25cdc4b3ae23ed518c
+MD5 (pure-ftpd-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 3d31b8c51402edf68446421db9b4e539

Fix: 

This is the first stable version.
